cache_lookup.description: Checks the cache for previously resolved queries. Short-circuits the pipeline on hit.

fuzzy_matching.description: Fuzzy string matching against the database index. Short-circuits on high-confidence matches, bypassing web search and LLM profiling entirely.

param_descriptions.threshold: Minimum similarity score (0-100) to accept a fuzzy match
param_descriptions.scorer: Scoring algorithm for fuzzy string comparison

web_search.description: Searches the web for contextual information about the input query. Retrieved content provides the primary raw context that entity_profiling uses to generate structured profiles — the quality of web results directly determines profiling quality.

user_agents: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/136.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

param_descriptions.query_prefix: Text prepended to the input query before web search — controls search focus, domain targeting, and terminology framing (e.g. 'LCA database' narrows to domain)
param_descriptions.query_suffix: Text appended to the input query before web search — adds qualifiers, constraints, or context keywords (e.g. 'material composition' adds specificity)
param_descriptions.num_results: Number of search engine results to request
param_descriptions.max_sites: Maximum number of web pages to fetch and extract content from
param_descriptions.content_char_limit: Maximum characters of content to extract per web page

entity_profiling.description: LLM-driven step that generates a structured entity profile from the input query and web-sourced raw content. Produces the required pipeline output (entity_profile). Profile quality depends on both the LLM configuration and the quality of upstream web_search results.

param_descriptions.raw_content_limit: Maximum characters of web-sourced raw content passed as context to the profiling LLM — bounds how much of web_search output is visible to the model
param_descriptions.temperature: LLM sampling temperature for profile generation
param_descriptions.max_tokens: Maximum tokens in the LLM profile generation response
param_descriptions.persona: Role framing — who the LLM is
param_descriptions.problem_description: Domain context, evidence, and input data

token_matching.description: Token-level retrieval matching entity profile fields against database entries. Candidate pool quality depends on the entity profile generated upstream.

param_descriptions.max_token_candidates: Maximum number of candidates to return from token matching

llm_ranking.description: LLM-driven re-ranking of token-matched candidates using a ranking prompt. Selects the best match from the candidate pool.

param_descriptions.max_tokens: Maximum tokens in the LLM ranking response
param_descriptions.sample_size: Number of candidates sampled from the pool for LLM ranking
param_descriptions.relevance_weight_core: Weight given to core-concept relevance in ranking score
param_descriptions.persona: Role framing — who the LLM is
param_descriptions.problem_description: Domain context, evidence, and input data

direct_prompt.description: Direct LLM prompt — generic 'run this prompt' step. Accepts custom system prompt via node_config. No session or terms required when used standalone.

param_descriptions.persona: Role framing — who the LLM is
param_descriptions.problem_description: Domain context, evidence, and input data

llm_only.description: Generic LLM call — send a system prompt + user query, get a text response. Bypasses all enrichment. No session or terms required.

param_descriptions.reasoning_effort: Hidden reasoning budget: low/medium/high. Trades reasoning depth against output token budget.
param_descriptions.persona: Role framing — who the LLM is
param_descriptions.problem_description: Domain context, evidence, and input data
